narrative:
Jennings Twp (precinct in Putnam County) has 1,405 registered voters, with 48.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 44.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 36.7 percentage points.
